nasb.text: From that time Jesus began to preach and say, “Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand.”

esv.text: From that time Jesus began to preach, saying, “Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand.”

cnv.text: 從那時起，耶穌就開始傳道，說：“天國近了，你們應當悔改。”

ccb.text: 从那时起，耶稣开始传道：“悔改吧，因为天国临近了！”

csbs.text: 从那时候起，耶稣开始传道，说：“你们应当悔改，因为天国近了。”
